title: DADS PROGRAM - 211info
text: DADS PROGRAM DADS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential alcohol and drug treatment for up to 10 men with children. Services may include individual and group counseling, case management, life skills education, parenting support, health screening, child care, and other support services. Eligibility: Fathers with children younger than age 5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 779-2003 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-2003 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Visitors must schedule a visit. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Fathers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
